title: Select issue.
body:
Hi,
can't select wire named \aa/N1
How to select such a wire?

```
read_ilang select.il 
dump
select -set testsel n:\aa/N1
dump @testsel
select -set testsel n:\data
dump @testsel
```

```
autoidx 1
attribute \top 1
module \wire_select
  wire \aa/N1
  wire input 1 \clk
  wire input 2 \data
  wire output 3 \out_o
  cell $dff $techmap\cc
    parameter \CLK_POLARITY 1'1
    parameter \WIDTH 1
    connect \CLK \aa/N1
    connect \D \data
    connect \Q \out_o
  end
  cell $not $techmap\cc1
    parameter \A_SIGNED 0
    parameter \A_WIDTH 1
    parameter \Y_WIDTH 1
    connect \A \clk
    connect \Y \aa/N1
  end
end
```
code_blocks:
autoidx 1
attribute \top 1
module \wire_select
  wire \aa/N1
  wire input 1 \clk
  wire input 2 \data
  wire output 3 \out_o
  cell $dff $techmap\cc
    parameter \CLK_POLARITY 1'1
    parameter \WIDTH 1
    connect \CLK \aa/N1
    connect \D \data
    connect \Q \out_o
  end
  cell $not $techmap\cc1
    parameter \A_SIGNED 0
    parameter \A_WIDTH 1
    parameter \Y_WIDTH 1
    connect \A \clk
    connect \Y \aa/N1
  end
end
